description:
Everyone loves a happy ending.
A cute little atmospheric animation of one of the possible endings for HABROMANIA. I have 4 (5, really) planned for now, and I consider them all canon. I don't love games that have a "true" ending, with the others just sort of throw-away ones you get if you don't explore enough or make the "correct" choices. I think each ending should fit thematically with the story and be a natural consequence of playstyle- even if they're bittersweet or unhappy, they should still feel satisfying. HABROMANIA isn't really a horror game in the obvious sense- it's mostly uncanny valley or liminal space vibes- but this ending leans the most into horror.
